subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! How many souls have soared to the horizon of sanctity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی کم من نفوس طارت الی افق التقدیس
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for the departed, @love of God, @firmness in the Covenant
